scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @playground/engine-fast && npm run build -w @playground/schema
scripts.build:ide: npm run build -w @playground/ide-core && npm run build -w @playground/ide
scripts.build:ide-api: npm run build -w @playground/ide-core && npm run build -w @playground/ide-api
scripts.test: npm run test -w @playground/engine-fast && npm run test -w @playground/schema && npm run test -w @playground/api && npm run test -w @playground/ide-core
